hero.headline:
CREATIVE
DEVELOPER
hero.description: Creative developer specializing in motion design (After Effects, Cinema 4D) and machine learning. Building interactive web experiences that blend visual storytelling with intelligent systems.

about.label: ABOUT DANIEL
about.headline: CREATIVE DEVELOPER IN MOTION
about.body: I build small visual systems that connect motion graphics, interactive code, and early ML/data experiments. My work is still growing, but it is grounded in curiosity, clear process, and a love for turning abstract ideas into moving, usable things.

projects.name: NEON PULSE
projects.description: A vibrant motion graphics piece exploring neon aesthetics and pulsing rhythms. This project combines geometric shapes with reactive lighting effects to create an hypnotic visual experience.
projects.objective: Create a hypnotic visual experience that syncs perfectly with electronic music beats.
projects.approach: Built custom expressions in After Effects to create reactive shapes. Used particular for particle effects and added glow through adjustment layers.
projects.outcome: A 45-second loop suitable for music visualizers or social media content that received positive feedback from the target audience.
projects.nextStep: Add interactive controls for beat detection and color palette customization.

projects.name: LIQUID FLOW
projects.description: An abstract fluid simulation exploring organic motion and color blending. Created in Cinema 4D with Octane render, this piece focuses on the beauty of natural fluid dynamics.
projects.objective: Explore the intersection of organic forms and digital simulation to create visually striking abstract art.
projects.approach: Started with reference收集 of ink in water and oil mixing. Used Cinema 4D's Pyro solver for fluid simulation, then enhanced with Octane's volumetric lighting.
projects.outcome: A series of 5 abstract loopable animations that have been featured in digital art exhibitions and shared across creative platforms.
projects.nextStep: Create an interactive web version where users can control fluid parameters in real-time.

projects.name: TASKFLOW DASHBOARD
projects.description: A sleek task management dashboard with real-time collaboration features. Built with modern React patterns and a clean, minimalist interface that prioritizes productivity.
projects.objective: Design and build a fast, intuitive task management system that teams actually want to use.
projects.approach: Started with user research to understand pain points in existing tools. Used React Query for data fetching, optimistic updates for instant feedback, and a drag-and-drop system for task organization.
projects.outcome: A fully functional dashboard used by 3 small teams. Reduced daily planning time by 40% according to user feedback.
projects.nextStep: Add AI-powered task suggestions and automated workflow triggers based on team patterns.

projects.name: CLIMATE VIZ
projects.description: An interactive data visualization project that presents climate change data in an engaging, understandable way. Users can explore temperature trends, carbon emissions, and sea level changes through intuitive charts.
projects.objective: Make complex climate data accessible and engaging for general audiences without sacrificing accuracy.
projects.approach: Processed raw climate datasets using Pandas, then created custom D3.js visualizations with smooth transitions. Added tooltips with detailed information and comparison features.
projects.outcome: A web application that presents 50 years of climate data through 15 interactive visualizations. Average session time of 8 minutes indicates deep engagement.
projects.nextStep: Add time-lapse animations showing decade-by-decade changes and integrate real-time current data feeds.

projects.name: Dynamic Interface Flow
projects.subtitle: Abstract motion piece visualizing modern UI interfaces with geometric precision and playful animations.
projects.details: Perfect for hero headers and background motion. Demonstrates mastery of timing, spatial organization, and turning static UI concepts into dynamic storytelling.
